name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 10 Jan 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we launched some minor UI enhancements in the A/B Campaign creation flow."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For details, please read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  ","bold":true}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancement","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"A/B Campaign UI Enhancements","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In step 2 of the A/B Campaign creation flow, we introduced some minor UI changes to help manage the split groups. The new UI is visually more intuitive and simplifies duplicating and deleting the split groups."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Delete and Duplicate icons are now permanently visible on the page. When no split group is selected, the icons remain disabled. When you select a split group (by clicking the check box), the icons get enabled. You can then click the Delete or Duplicate icon to perform the desired action."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about creating A/B Campaigns, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-AB-Campaigns","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating A/B Campaigns","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/duplicateabgroup.0685g00000COhkeAAD.gif","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/duplicateabgroup.0685g00000COhkeAAD.gif","name":"duplicate_ab_group","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":766,"width":1158}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Reminder!!","bold":true},{"text":" A/B Campaign Report consists of both vertical and horizontal scrolls. When scrolling horizontally, the metric labels remain static, making it easier to read and compare data from all the split groups."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about A/B Campaign Reports, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/AB-Campaign-Reports","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"A/B Campaign Reports","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignReportcopy.0685g00000COhl2AAD.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignReportcopy.0685g00000COhl2AAD.png","name":"AB_Campaign Report copy","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2239,"width":2464}}]}]
